nasb.text: He killed of Edom in the Valley of Salt 10,000 and took Sela by war, and named it Joktheel to this day.

esv.text: He struck down ten thousand Edomites in the Valley of Salt and took Sela by storm, and called it Joktheel, which is its name to this day.

cnv.text: 他在鹽谷擊殺了一萬以東人，又攻取了西拉，然後把它的名字改稱為約帖，直到今日。

ccb.text: 亚玛谢曾在盐谷杀了一万以东人，攻占了西拉，把西拉改名为约帖，沿用至今。
